desc: DONE offline: completed the XNU-shim feasibility checkpoint and sharpened draft escalation using the exact T6041 handler decode and three-SoC comparison. The route remains coherent but low-confidence: boot a permissive XNU KC, inherit genuine SPTM, and pivot post-init_xnu_ro_data. Two blockers are explicit—caller-domain provenance and survival of CoastGuard TCB/CID/SART/queue plus SEP-loaded key state. The m1n1-HV trace route is dead; only an upstream answer or signed shim boot can resolve them. P0 skeleton/interface/signing scope is complete and sptm_nvme_call remains stubbed. Draft only; nothing posted or run. Result: done/2026-07-23-t6040-sptm-xnushim-feasibility.md.
author: fable
